title: content-scoped ask 規則 (Bash(touch *)) は sandbox の auto-allow を貫通してプロンプト強制。対象外コマンドは auto-allow のまま

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: touch s4f-file.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command was blocked. Error: `probe: recording ask, denying to avoid side effects`

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > inside.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.

hypothesis: content-scoped ask 規則は sandbox の auto-allow より強く、対象コマンドはプロンプト強制 (ask x ok)。bare `Bash` ask (e: sandbox 実行分にはスキップ) との対比で、auto-allow を貫通するのは『内容を指定した ask』だけと分かる。
